name: Suss-Saures Rotkraut (Sweet-and-sour Red Cabba
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 4-quart Dutch oven.
2. Add apples and onions, sauté slightly.
3. Add finely shredded cabbage, red wine, cloves, sugar, and bay leaves.
4. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour.
5. Add the remaining ingredients (vinegar, additional butter, and lemon juice).
6. Heat to melt the butter and serve immediately.
